title: Silicone Sealant Adhesion Failure on Bituminous Substrates
mechanism: Silicone sealants do not achieve adequate adhesion to bituminous substrates. Oils and plasticizers in asphalt-based materials migrate into the silicone, preventing bond formation and causing delamination at the interface.
notes: Do not apply silicone sealant directly to APP, SBS, or built-up roofing substrates. Use polyurethane or polysulfide alternatives for bituminous interfaces.
